page_content: BMGT442 Advanced Portfolio Management BMGT443 Applied Equity Analysis and Portfolio Management BMGT444 Futures and Options Contracts BMGT445 Banking and Financial Institutions BMGT446 International Finance BMGT447 Intermediate One intermediate Macro (ECON305/ECON325) or ECON Micro (ECON306/ECON326) course In addition, a MAXIMUM OF ONE of the following courses (3cr) may be applied towards this 12 cr requirement: BMGT349 Private Equity and Venture Capital BMGT448 Special Topics in Finance BMGT449 Investment Fund Management: Lemma Senbet Fund BMGT310 Intermediate Accounting I BMGT313 Financial Statement Analysis BMGT332 Quantitative Models for Management Decisions BMGT430 Data Modeling in Business BMGT438A Applied Quantitative Analysis (QUEST) and ECON423 Econometrics II (ECON majors) are approved as course substitutes for this major requirement. Money and Banking or BMGT341 Financial Markets 3 3
